summary: Testing iteration 34: Tested Business & Artist Dashboard Analytics feature. Backend analytics API endpoints fully working. Frontend login is blocked due to backend URL misconfiguration.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend making API requests to wrong URL (perix-preview.preview.emergentagent.com) instead of crash-debug-build.preview.emergentagent.com. The Constants.expoConfig?.extra?.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is returning a different value than expected from app.json. This blocks all authenticated frontend testing.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix frontend backend URL configuration. The app.json has EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL set to 'https://perix-fixes.preview.emergentagent.com' but the frontend is making requests to 'https://perix-fixes.preview.emergentagent.com'. The Constants.expoConfig?.extra lookup appears to be picking up a cached/bundled value. Need to clear Expo cache completely or fix the URL resolution in lib/api.ts, context/AuthContext.tsx, and context/NotificationContext.tsx.
Add data-testid attributes to dashboard analytics components for better testability (AnalyticsDashboard, AnalyticsCard, EngagementSection, AudienceInsights)

success_rate.frontend: 33% (login page tests pass, authenticated tests blocked)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend analytics API tests all pass (13 tests in test_analytics_api.py). Frontend tests pass for unauthenticated flows and API verification via Playwright request API. The main blocker is the frontend backend URL misconfiguration preventing login from working in Playwright. Added data-testid attributes to business and artist dashboard tabs.
rca_of_issue: Frontend login fails with 'Request failed' because: 1) Frontend makes API request to perix-preview.preview.emergentagent.com, 2) This URL returns 404, 3) The actual backend is at crash-debug-build.preview.emergentagent.com. Root cause: The EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL in Constants.expoConfig?.extra is returning a hardcoded/cached value rather than the value in app.json or .env. The frontend code in lib/api.ts, AuthContext.tsx, and NotificationContext.tsx all use this pattern: Constants.expoConfig?.extra?.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL || process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL || fallback
